items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the '5-session package purchase' scenario, but the evidence does not provide any concrete results or outcomes from this simulation. While the step outlines the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured to support this validation. The lack of direct evidence regarding the execution and results of the scenario leads to an inconclusive status.
